title: Air China Cargo increases flight frequency from Glasgow Prestwick

sections.heading: Summary
sections.content: Air China Cargo increases flight frequency from Glasgow Prestwick. Glasgow Prestwick Airport (Prestwick) has announced that Air China Cargo has increased its cargo service between Prestwick and Chengdu...

sourceReferences.citationText: serper-scottish-aviation – Air China Cargo increases flight frequency from Glasgow Prestwick
